description: For Transformer Thermal Impact assessement due to geomagnetic disturbance event, set the geoelectric field waveshape as NERC TPL-007-2 benhcmark event. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.10.0 and 34.2.0. ierr = gic_efield_waveshape_ref()
